payload.content_type: board meeting minutes and procurement package
payload.title: MTA Board Action Items
payload.description: MTA Board Meeting minutes and procurement package for September 20, 2023 meeting, covering July 19, 2023 board minutes and various procurement actions across MTA agencies

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: New York City Transit (President Richard Davey)
2023 Fare and Crossing Charge Increases Approved

payload.description: Board approved 2023 Fare Increases and 2023 Crossing Charge Increases for MTA, NYCTA, MaBSTOA, SIRTOA, MTA Bus, Metro-North and LIRR, and Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority facilities

tool_args.label: Fordham Road Bus Lane Redesign Initiative

payload.description: Update on the Fordham Road Bus Lane Redesign initiative in the Bronx, N.Y. provided by President Richard Davey, NYCT
payload.project_name: Fordham Road Bus Lane Redesign Initiative

payload.description: MTA Board Meeting at 2 Broadway 20th Floor Board Room New York, NY 10004
Regular Board Meeting; meeting adjourned at 1:38 p.m.

payload.claim_text: MTA Blue-Ribbon Panel on Fare and Toll Evasion co-chairs Rosemonde Pierre-Louis and Roger Juan Maldonado presented the panel's report focusing on education, environment, enforcement, and equity, and discussed the panel's recommendations
payload.subject: MTA Blue-Ribbon Panel on Fare and Toll Evasion

payload.claim_text: With $700 million currently being lost annually, fare evasion is a serious threat to the MTA
payload.statement: $700 million currently being lost annually to fare evasion

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.

payload.claim_text: Under Mayor Adams' leadership transit crime fell 14% last month -- down 5% year-to-date versus 2022, 6% lower than pre-COVID
payload.subject: transit crime

tool_args.label: MTA Open Data & Analytic Program Presentation

payload.claim_text: Jon Kaufman, Chief, Strategic Initiatives, provided an overview of the group's mission and Andy Kuziemko, Vice President, Strategic Initiatives, introduced the MTA Data and Analytic program and discussed the group's initiatives
payload.subject: MTA Open Data & Analytic Program

payload.description: Net increase in CPI factor for twelve month period ending March 31, 2023 used for station maintenance billing
EDPL public hearing for Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project to inform public and receive comments on proposed property acquisitions

JCI Phase 2 objectives: raise maximum-allowable train speeds, increase train throughput, add parallel routing capabilities, implement universal 12-car platforming capacity, and implement full state-of-good-repair throughout the entire Jamaica complex

Phase 2 will extend the Q line into Harlem creating new stations on Second Avenue at 106th, 116th, and 125th Streets. Field office lease at 159 East 125th Street approved for SAS2 design and buildout period.

Master agreement with Amtrak to facilitate acquisition of permanent easements in the Bronx and Queens, and acquisition of permanent easements from HD Development of Maryland, Inc. at 50-02 Northern Boulevard, Queens in support of the Penn Station Access project
New electrical substation at 3876-3880 Park Avenue (Block 2904, Lot 10), Bronx, NY. Authorization to acquire property interests from 1049 Ogden Realty Company, LLC.
SAS2 field office at 159 East 125th Street expected to be operational, coinciding with onboarding of SAS2 contractors
